title: dendrocnide cordifolia
intro: Dendrocnide cordifolia, also known as the giant stinging tree, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its sap. The health benefits of Dendrocnide cordifolia are said to include pain relief, wound healing, and antiseptic properties, although its effectiveness is not scientifically proven. In some traditional herbal preparations, the plant's sap is used to treat skin conditions and wounds, but its use is often cautioned due to its highly irritating and toxic properties.
